'''Lamorrack''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] representative from [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. Following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], he was captured by the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] slaver [[Slar-dan ti Gardi]] and sold to the [[Vax Mining Group]].

{{Char-stub}}
